reviews.review_title: Not worth it, paradiddle is 100x better
reviews.review_description: Its so limited on what you can do. Theres a delay, and i cant play fast tempo songs like metallica or pantera. Cant edit the drumset, kinda laggy too. Just please.. buy paradiddle. you can even play songs.

Yeah so I joined and I had mega delay like I was trying to play umbrella and you really can’t drum fast it will just not sense the bangs so yeah it’s not the worst bud definitely not the best. Do not recommend if you are a faster banger.

It’s not worth getting because once you get it you realize there is nothing to do besides play the drums, which are delayed. There are no other features besides the fact that you can add metronome or make the drum kit electric. This game is a one time use.
Stu jbxsfhg

I don't know why everyone is giving this a

 bad review it's not the best drumming app but it's the only free one. And for being free it's amazing.
Just spend money on paradiddle this game is very delayed amd sounds kinda bad 0/10 i would not recomend
I wanted to play a virtual drumset and this was the only free one but  it had bad delay.. Good concept but bad game.
This game is awsome if people say INPUT IS OFF they are lying this game is great, definitly recomend especialy cause it is free
Just download paradiddle atp bruh💔😭
Amazing for a free VR drum set but doing the kick pedals was a bit awkward but mostly I like that you can change what type of drum set it is.
That delay absolutely hurts my soul.

I love this game it’s so 
Fun

reviews.review_title: Cool concept, but simply not possible
reviews.review_description: Unfortunately this game suffers from massive input delays, an inability to register multiple consecutive movements (making things like high hats useless) as well as overall clunkyness. It’s impossible to drum to anything over 10 bpm due to these restrictions, which is basically every piece of music ever written.
fun game
So far it has been pretty good for learning simple songs would recommend to the learners out there! plus it's free!!!👍
Back when I bought this game I thought it was nope hell no can’t drum fast can’t play a simple beat and it’s a waste of money
Amazing game. Very good sfx on the drums and also many different styles laces to play and how to play.
This game is horrible, there is no tutorial, no song to play, only only thing that is okay, is the environment. You can’t do fast drumming in the game which sucks. DO NOT BUY
I like the environments but the game can’t withstand fast drumming so I can’t do Metallica songs which upsets me.

took very long time
it was good. but if Metallica drums where it would be the best
Sucks delay everything you hate
It's a okay game but it's just boring and I wish it gives you practice song to play but that's not happening.
I'm sorry but this game was bad the controls were bad but overall sound was ok
Lags too much. Sounds terrible. Waste of time and memory. *DO NOT DOWNLOAD!*
It’s delayed when you do a note and the drums are crappy. Not a good app *don’t download*

I think the first step towards a good vr drumset is decent samples. It sounds terrible. Everything feels janky. When your stick passes through a drum and you bring it back up, it plays another note. Not good.

So I expected this game to be bad based off the Reviews BUT I WAS WRONG this game is amazing!! From being in a 70s garage to your own home in mixed reality is awesome! And I love that it’s hand tracking makes it feel really immersive like I’m actually playing the drums!! Don’t listen to any bad reviews this game is amazing! And for free too!? I just had to get it.

This game is really neat and has a lot of potential! I’m just starting to learn drums but drum kits are really expensive so this really helps me to learn positioning and things like that. It does need a few tweaks though, which is completely understandable since it’s in early development. I’d recommend making the drums and cymbals a bit less wobbly and more responsive to be more like real drums. You could also space out the drums a bit more so you can still have the same responsiveness but don’t hit drums you don’t want to while playing. It would also be neat if you increased the volume of the drums when they’re hit harder, not a requirement but it would be cool. Other than that, this game is amazing! The atmosphere and design are phenomenal and I can’t wait to see more from this game. Cheers!
Why do the drums move when you hit them

ok, i know that instruments in VR will always never be as amazing as actual instruments, let alone the drums but this game is on another level. The hand tracking is really bad and won’t always sound when hit against a drum like the snare for example and yes yes, i know it’s still being developed coz it’s in app lab but still bro…
